Meaning.En: a room or enclosed space, especially one used for a specific purpose
Meaning.Example: The defendant entered the courtroom and took his seat in the defendant’s chamber.

Situation.Vi: Phòng riêng của thẩm phán trong tòa án
Situation.En: The private office or room of a judge in a courthouse

Situation.Vi: Buồng chứa phôi trong phòng thí nghiệm sinh học
Situation.En: A sealed compartment in a laboratory device used to hold biological samples

Meaning.En: one of the two lower chambers of the heart that pump blood out to the body or lungs
Meaning.Example: The left ventricle is the largest and strongest chamber of the heart.

Situation.Vi: Bác sĩ siêu âm tim đánh giá chức năng của các buồng tim
Situation.En: The cardiologist uses echocardiography to assess the function of the heart chambers

Meaning.En: a sealed compartment in a gun, cannon, or engine where combustion or compression occurs
Meaning.Example: The explosion in the combustion chamber drives the piston downward.

Situation.Vi: Kỹ sư động cơ kiểm tra độ kín của buồng đốt
Situation.En: The engine engineer checks the integrity of the combustion chamber before startup
